name: fumi-extension
description: Bridge browser JS and host-side scripts via Native Messaging.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp -R public/. dist/ && node -e "const f='dist/userscript/prelude.js';require('fs').writeFileSync(f,require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/^export \{\};\s*$/m,''));"
